---
title: "Used Software"
---

## Codes developed at DPCATCH ##

### SlotFlow ###

A deep learning framework for amortized trans-dimensional inference using slot-based conditional normalizing flows.


<https://github.com/nhouba/slotflow-inference>

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.23228>


Author: Niklas Houba


### hbgb ###



<https://github.com/dpcatch/HBGB>


Author: Arianna Renzini


### GBconfusion ###

Package to estimate the galactic confusion noise for LISA.


<https://github.com/dpcatch/GBconfusion>



Author: Alice Cravioglio


### GlobalGB ###

Pipeline for searching Galactic Binaries (GBs) in Mojito/LDC-style LISA data

<https://arxiv.org/pdf/2403.15318>
 
<https://github.com/stefanstrub/GlobalGB>

Author: Stefan Strub





## Other Codes ##



### Geemoo ###

GPU-accelerated multi-source global fit pipeline for LISA data

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.10277>


### Erebor ###

GPU-accelerated multi-source global fit pipeline for LISA data

<https://lisa-analysis-tools.github.io/lisa-analysis-tools>

<https://journals.aps.org/prd/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevD.111.024060>

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.04690> 


### Glass ###

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.03673>
